nodes.label: Root
nodes.description: The root node represents the starting point of the guideline.

nodes.label: Guideline Development Process
nodes.description: This node represents the process of developing the guideline, including the WHO Steering Group, Guideline Development Group, systematic review teams, and external peer review.

nodes.label: Evidence and Recommendations
nodes.description: This node represents the evidence and recommendations for the management of pneumonia and diarrhoea in children.
